ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaint_overviews" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual overview entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the overview */,
  "total_complaints" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints received */,
  "total_companies" INTEGER /* Total number of companies involved in the complaints */,
  "highest_percentage" REAL /* Highest percentage of complaints against a single company */,
  "average_resolution_time" REAL /* Average time taken to resolve complaints (in days) */,
  "average_complaint_value" TEXT /* Average value of complaints */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_overviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product (e.g., bank account, credit card) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial product (e.g., deposit, loan) */,
  "product_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the financial product (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial product */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial company */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_details" TEXT /* Details of the complaint */,
  "complaint_category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  "complaint_value" TEXT /* Value of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, company representative, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the complaint */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES complaint_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_category_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mappings_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES complaint_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mappings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES complaint_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mappings_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, draft) */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., consumer protection, data privacy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial company */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory policy */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance check */,
  "audit_report" TEXT /* Audit report for the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_compliance_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES regulatory_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_compliance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint resolution */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  "resolution_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_resolutions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_controls_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
